lines: Urampamagara, Yesu, Kuk' uz' izina ryanjye; Nanjy' uwagucumuyeho Ubu ndihannye rwose.
Nshaka kukwiyegurira :mber' Umwungeri, Mwami; Ujy’ undagir' ukT ushaka.
Wemeye kwitanga rwose Ng' unkize, Yesu wanjye; Iyo neza yaw' ishimwe, Naw'
Witinya, mutima wanjye,Yes' arakujy' imbere : Mu kubaho kwawe kose, Nta
